The '''Elders''' were the holy men of the [[Skakoan religion]]. They resided on the [[Power Mounds of the Elders]] on [[Skako/Legends|Skako]] and read from the ''[[Book of the Boolmide]]''. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the chief Elder was [[Clongor]].
